Frequently Asked Questions

How do I access subscription content? 
You need a FOX Soccer 2GO website subscription in order to access the live streams and full match replays on the application. You can sign up on the website.

How much does it cost? 
Our pricing options are clearly displayed on our website. 

What do I get?
You get access to all live streams and full match replay clips available on the FOX Soccer 2GO website, including 1,000 + games per season from the UEFA Champions League, UEFA Europa League, CONCACAF Gold Cup, FA Cup, Scottish Premier League, CONCACAF Champions League, Heineken Cup Rugby, and much more!

When will highlights be available on the application?
Highlights are published at a pre-determined period after the final whistle of any game played. This period is in line with rights holders broadcast restrictions. 

Can I access the service on a mobile connection? 
Yes, all live streaming and videos are available on a mobile connection, however a poor data connection can result in buffering or reverting to audio only. The application requires a 3G, 4G, or WiFi data connection. Watching video over a 3G or 4G connection may affect your wireless data plan.

Is this service available outside of the US? 
This service is only available to download from the US Google Play Store. All live streams are restricted to US residents, however you are able to access news, data, and short-form VOD outside of the US.

Can I download content to my device? 
No, this is a streaming only service. Purchasing access will allow unlimited streaming of available content within your access period. 

If I have problems using this service who do I contact? 
If you have problems with your subscription please contact us by clicking the Settings button and then "Feedback" to let us know.
